title: Lift, Splat, Shoot: Encoding Images from Arbitrary Camera Rigs by Implicitly Unprojecting to 3D
abstract: A camera-only method that lifts image features into 3D and splats them into a bird's-eye-view representation for downstream perception tasks.

title: BEVDet: High-performance Multi-camera 3D Object Detection in Bird-Eye-View
abstract: A camera-based BEV detection framework focusing on efficient view transformation and strong 3D detection performance.

title: BEVFormer: Learning Bird's-Eye-View Representation from Multi-Camera Images via Spatiotemporal Transformers
abstract: A transformer-based model that aggregates spatial and temporal information from multi-camera images to produce BEV features.

title: VoxelNet: End-to-End Learning for Point Cloud Based 3D Object Detection
abstract: A LiDAR-focused method that learns feature representation directly from point clouds using voxel feature encoding.

title: CenterPoint: Center-based 3D Object Detection and Tracking
abstract: A center-based framework for 3D object detection and tracking, commonly used in LiDAR-based autonomous driving systems.

title: TransFusion: Robust LiDAR-Camera Fusion for 3D Object Detection with Transformers
abstract: A fusion framework that combines LiDAR and camera features through transformer mechanisms for robust 3D detection.
